what_is_the_error: Error rate for checkout has jumped sharply; HTTP 5xx or application exceptions are climbing relative to traffic.
likely_cause: Bad deploy, misconfigured feature flag, database constraint failures, or an upstream outage causing cascading errors.
remediation_suggestions: Triage logs for the dominant exception class and failing endpoint.
If tied to a new release, roll back or disable the offending feature flag.
Verify database migrations and connection health.
Engage on-call for payments if errors cluster on payment callbacks.
triage_summary: High-severity error burst on checkout-demo: errors increasing quickly; treat as release or dependency regression until proven otherwise.
suspected_cause: Recent code change or brittle dependency handling under load.
